name: DepositFetchCustomer
businessLogic: Read CIF_ID primitive from SlotsDTO; throw FbpValidationException with CIF_ID_IS_NULL_OR_INVALID if null or blank.

Build a HashMap input with customerId set to cifId and call domainService.retrieveCustomer(input) to retrieve customer JSON; throw FbpValidationException with CUSTOMER_NOT_FOUND_IN_SOURCE_SYSTEM if response is null.
Deserialize the customer JSON string into a ReferenceCustomerDTO using ObjectMapper; throw FbpValidationException with CUSTOMER_NOT_FOUND_IN_SOURCE_SYSTEM if deserialization yields null.
Determine isCorporateCustomer by checking if referenceCustomer.getEntityType() equals 'CORPORATE' (case-insensitive) and set IS_CORPORATE_CUSTOMER on SlotsDTO.

Catch JacksonException and throw FbpValidationException with ERROR_PARSING_PAYLOAD_JSON; re-throw FbpValidationException as-is; catch any other Exception and throw FbpValidationException with CUSTOMER_NOT_FOUND_IN_SOURCE_SYSTEM.
